name: Dirty COW — Privilege Escalation
description: Race condition in mm/gup.c allows local privilege escalation.

name: PwnKit — pkexec Privilege Escalation
description: Memory corruption in polkit pkexec allows local root.

name: Baron Samedit — sudo Heap Overflow
description: Heap overflow in sudo allows any local user to gain root.

name: Dirty Pipe — Privilege Escalation
description: Flaw in pipe buffer flags allows overwriting read-only files.

name: nf_tables Use-After-Free LPE
description: Use-after-free in nf_tables allows local privilege escalation.

name: Heartbleed — OpenSSL Memory Leak
description: Buffer over-read in OpenSSL TLS heartbeat leaks memory contents.

name: Log4Shell — Log4j JNDI RCE
description: JNDI lookup in log4j-core allows unauthenticated remote code execution.
